name: Solo the Melodious Songstress
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>幻</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>奏</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>そう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>歌</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>うた</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>姫</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ひめ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ソロ
desc: If your opponent controls a monster and you control no monsters, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). When this card is destroyed by battle and sent to the Graveyard: You can Special Summon 1 "Melodious" monster from your Deck, except "Solo the Melodious Songstress".
mnst_eff: If your opponent controls a monster and you control no monsters, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). When this card is destroyed by battle and sent to the Graveyard: You can Special Summon 1 "Melodious" monster from your Deck, except "Solo the Melodious Songstress".
eff: If your opponent controls a monster and you control no monsters, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). When this card is destroyed by battle and sent to the Graveyard: You can Special Summon 1 "Melodious" monster from your Deck, except "Solo the Melodious Songstress".

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
